metadata.description: Agent Skills for AI/ML tasks including dataset creation, model training, evaluation, and research paper publishing on Hugging Face Hub

plugins.name: huggingface-llm-trainer
plugins.description: Train or fine-tune language models using TRL on Hugging Face Jobs infrastructure. Covers SFT, DPO, GRPO and reward modeling training methods, plus GGUF conversion for local deployment. Includes hardware selection, cost estimation, Trackio monitoring, and Hub persistence.

plugins.name: huggingface-paper-publisher
plugins.description: Publish and manage research papers on Hugging Face Hub. Supports creating paper pages, linking papers to models/datasets, claiming authorship, and generating professional markdown-based research articles.

plugins.name: huggingface-papers
plugins.description: Look up and read Hugging Face paper pages in markdown, and use the papers API for structured metadata like authors, linked models, datasets, Spaces, and media URLs when needed.

plugins.name: huggingface-community-evals
plugins.description: Add and manage evaluation results in Hugging Face model cards. Supports extracting eval tables from README content, importing scores from Artificial Analysis API, and running custom evaluations with vLLM/lighteval.

plugins.name: hf-cli
plugins.description: Execute Hugging Face Hub operations using the hf CLI. Download models/datasets, upload files, manage repos, and run cloud compute jobs.

plugins.name: huggingface-jobs
plugins.description: Run compute jobs on Hugging Face infrastructure. Execute Python scripts, manage scheduled jobs, and monitor job status.

plugins.name: huggingface-trackio
plugins.description: Track and visualize ML training experiments with Trackio. Log metrics via Python API and retrieve them via CLI. Supports real-time dashboards synced to HF Spaces.

plugins.name: huggingface-datasets
plugins.description: Explore, query, and extract data from any Hugging Face dataset using the Dataset Viewer REST API and npx tooling. Zero Python dependencies — covers split/config discovery, row pagination, text search, filtering, SQL via parquetlens, and dataset upload via CLI.

plugins.name: huggingface-tool-builder
plugins.description: Build reusable scripts for Hugging Face Hub and API workflows. Useful for chaining API calls, enriching Hub metadata, or automating repeated tasks.

plugins.name: huggingface-gradio
plugins.description: Build Gradio web UIs and demos in Python. Use when creating or editing Gradio apps, components, event listeners, layouts, or chatbots.

plugins.name: transformers-js
plugins.description: Run state-of-the-art machine learning models directly in JavaScript/TypeScript for NLP, computer vision, audio processing, and multimodal tasks. Works in Node.js and browsers with WebGPU/WASM using Hugging Face models.

plugins.name: huggingface-vision-trainer
plugins.description: Train and fine-tune object detection models (RTDETRv2, YOLOS, DETR and others) and image classification models (timm and transformers models — MobileNetV3, MobileViT, ResNet, ViT/DINOv3) using Transformers Trainer API on Hugging Face Jobs infrastructure or locally. Includes COCO dataset format support, Albumentations augmentation, mAP/mAR metrics, trackio tracking, hardware selection, and Hub persistence.
